about.title: About
about.subtitle: 9 years of AI Physics experience, building AI Physicists and better AI physics methods

mlPotentials.title: Machine Learning Potentials
mlPotentials.desc: Developing neural network-based interatomic potentials for magnetic and ferroelectric materials

ferroic.title: Ferroic Materials
ferroic.desc: Computational study of ferroelectric and multiferroic materials for next-generation devices

aiScience.title: AI for Science
aiScience.desc: Applying deep learning methods to accelerate materials discovery and simulation

phd.thesis: Dissertation: Machine Learning Methods for Ferroic Materials

bs.thesis: Honors program in physics with focus on theoretical physics

achievements.prl: Published 2 papers in Physical Review Letters (2025)
achievements.spingnn: Developed SpinGNN++ - A comprehensive magnetic machine learning potential
achievements.pasp: Contributed to PASP software package development

publications.title: Selected
publications.subtitle: Peer-reviewed publications in top-tier journals, focusing on machine learning methods and ferroic materials research

research.title: Research
research.subtitle: Interdisciplinary research at the intersection of computational physics, materials science, and artificial intelligence

ml.title: ML Physics Method Development
ml.subtitle: AI-Driven Physics Modeling Tools
ml.desc: Developing machine learning methods and tools for physical systems, including SpinGNN/SpinGNN++ magnetic potential frameworks, HamGNN Hamiltonian prediction network, deeply integrating physical symmetries with deep learning.

ferroelectric.title: Ferroelectric Materials
ferroelectric.subtitle: Novel Ferroelectric Phenomena
ferroelectric.desc: Investigating unconventional ferroelectricity in emerging materials, including sliding ferroelectrics, elemental ferroelectrics, and HfO₂-based ferroelectrics for next-generation memory devices.

multiferroic.title: Multiferroic Materials
multiferroic.subtitle: Magnetoelectric Coupling
multiferroic.desc: Exploring multiferroic materials and magnetoelectric coupling phenomena, particularly in twisted van der Waals materials and moiré superlattices.

computational.title: Computational Methods
computational.subtitle: First-Principles & Beyond
computational.desc: Developing and applying advanced computational methods, from first-principles calculations to large-scale machine learning simulations, for materials discovery and property prediction.

aiPhysicist.title: AI Physicist
aiPhysicist.subtitle: Physics JARVIS
aiPhysicist.desc: Developing AI Physicist systems — Physics JARVIS that autonomously performs physics modeling, simulation and analysis. Building better AI physics method tools to drive a phase transition in research paradigms.

research.platformDesc: Contributing to sci-ai.cn — a platform integrating AI computational tools for materials science research, promoting the application of artificial intelligence in condensed matter physics.
